title: Snake Arena
description: Classic snake game with a modern competitive twist. Eat, grow, and dominate the arena!
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to move

title: Block Blast
description: Fit blocks into the grid and clear lines to score big. A satisfying brain teaser!
controls: Drag and drop blocks

title: Zombie Shooter
description: Survive endless waves of zombies. Upgrade weapons and fight for survival!
controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot

title: Fruit Ninja Slash
description: Slice through fruits at lightning speed. Avoid the bombs and rack up combos!
controls: Swipe or click and drag to slice

title: Color Sort Puzzle
description: Sort colored liquids into matching tubes. Simple rules, addictive gameplay.
controls: Click tubes to pour

title: Speed Racer 3D
description: Race through neon cityscapes at insane speeds. Dodge traffic and beat your record!
controls: Arrow keys or A/D to steer

title: Bubble Pop Mania
description: Match and pop colorful bubbles before they reach the bottom. Aim carefully!
controls: Aim and click to shoot bubbles

title: Ninja Dash
description: Run, jump, and slash through enemies in this fast-paced ninja platformer!
controls: Tap or Space to jump, Click to attack

title: Chess Master Online
description: Play chess against AI or challenge friends. Multiple difficulty levels available.
controls: Click to select and move pieces

title: Galaxy Invaders
description: Defend Earth from alien invasion! Classic space shooter with modern graphics.
controls: Arrow keys to move, Space to fire

title: Tower Defense Pro
description: Build strategic towers to stop the enemy horde. Plan your defense wisely!
controls: Click to place and upgrade towers

title: Snake.io Multiplayer
description: Slither around the arena, eat orbs, and become the biggest snake on the server!
controls: Mouse to steer, click to boost

title: Jewel Match
description: Swap and match sparkling jewels in this addictive match-3 puzzle game.
controls: Click and drag to swap jewels

title: Stickman Fighter
description: Epic stickman combat with crazy physics. Punch, kick, and ragdoll your way to victory!
controls: WASD + J/K to punch/kick

title: Drift Boss
description: Master the art of drifting on an endless road. One-touch controls, infinite fun!
controls: Tap or click to turn right

title: Word Search Pro
description: Find hidden words in a grid of letters. Hundreds of categories to explore!
controls: Click and drag to select words

title: Snake Classic Retro
description: The original Nokia-style snake game reborn in HD. Pure nostalgic fun!
controls: Arrow keys to change direction

title: Basketball Stars
description: Shoot hoops and pull off trick shots in this addictive basketball game!
controls: Click and drag to aim, release to shoot

title: Merge Master
description: Merge items to create powerful new ones. A satisfying idle puzzle experience!
controls: Drag items to merge matching ones

title: Survival Island
description: Craft, build, and survive on a mysterious island. Explore and uncover secrets!
controls: WASD to move, E to interact, mouse to look

title: Pixel Snake Adventure
description: A snake game with RPG elements! Level up, collect power-ups, and defeat bosses.
controls: Arrow keys to move, Space for special ability

title: Flappy Jump
description: Navigate through obstacles in this impossibly addictive one-button game!
controls: Tap or click to jump

title: Cyber Assault
description: Hack and blast through a cyberpunk world. Intense top-down action shooter!
controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot

title: Sudoku Challenge
description: The classic number puzzle with multiple difficulty levels and daily challenges.
controls: Click cell, type number
